name: LLM Adapter (OpenAI-compatible)
description: Generic OpenAI-compatible adapter — works with OpenRouter, NVIDIA NIM, Ollama, vLLM, DeepSeek, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint

baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Leave empty for OpenRouter (default).

model.description: Model ID. Format depends on provider (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 on OpenRouter, moonshotai/kimi-k2.6 on NVIDIA NIM).
